_draftStatus: [DRAFT — NOT NEUTRAL UNTIL HUMAN-REVISED] AI-drafted starter content. Verify factual plausibility, anti-stereotype calibration, and structural parity with the other three affidavits before treating as production content. The symmetry CI test must not run on this file until reviewed.
name: Rohit Mukherjee

education.institution: Government Law College, University of Calcutta

profession.details: Senior advocate, Calcutta High Court, with a commercial-law and arbitration practice. Bar Council of West Bengal member since 2004; previously partner at a Kolkata-based firm advising mid-sized manufacturers and infrastructure SPVs.

declaredAssets.summary: ₹2.1 crore total: ₹70 lakh movable (bank deposits, fixed deposits, modest equity portfolio, one car), ₹1.4 crore immovable (a 3-BHK flat in Salt Lake purchased 2012, a small office unit in Esplanade).

declaredCases.description: Defamation suit filed in 2022 by a former client over public statements made during a televised panel discussion regarding a banking-fraud allegation. Matter pending before the Calcutta City Civil Court.

affidavit.priorPublicServiceDetails: MLA, Howrah Central (2011–2016) — chaired the State Assembly's sub-committee on industrial dispute resolution. Vice-president, Bar Association of the Calcutta High Court (2018–2020). Pro bono counsel for the Federation of MSMEs of West Bengal (2014–2019).
